name_en: (With full packaging)!!️ Gucci logo bi-fold wallet. The men's daily accessories collection is reimagined with classic black leather. The 2024 Early Spring collection reinterprets classic accessories with the Gucci lettering, cleverly showcasing the brand's identity. Features eight card slots and two bill compartments. Black leather, cloud print fabric lining, Gucci logo.
name_cn:
(With full packaging)!!️ Gucci logo bi-fold wallet. The men's daily accessories collection is reimagined with classic black leather. The 2024 Early Spring collection reinterprets classic accessories with the Gucci lettering, cleverly showcasing the brand's identity. Features eight card slots and two bill compartments. Black leather, cloud print fabric lining, Gucci logo.
Model: 771153.
Open dimensions: 9cm (L) x 21cm (W)
Closed dimensions: 9cm (L) x 11cm (W)
Color: Black/Original leather.
